guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 16. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_er: Point to the big ER and say: errrrr. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_ar: Now point to the big AR and say: arrrrr.

parent_story: A little spider sat in a fast car. A star shone on the flower in the dark.
